title: Failure Analysis
description: AI-powered root-cause breakdown of failing tests across every project — categories, confidence, affected components, suggested fixes, and unanalysed gaps.

list.name: team
list.label: Team
list.query: SELECT slug FROM teams ORDER BY name

list.name: project
list.label: Project
list.query: SELECT p.slug FROM projects p JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE '$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team' ORDER BY p.name

list.name: search
list.label: Error Search
list.description: Filter raw failures by error text (case-insensitive substring match)

panels.title: Analyses Run
panels.description: Total AI failure classifications in the time range and scope.

targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*) AS "Analyses" FROM failure_analyses fa JOIN projects p ON p.id = fa.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE $__timeFilter(fa.analysed_at) AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project') AND ('$category' = 'All' OR fa.category = '$category')

panels.title: Unique Failing Tests
panels.description: Distinct test IDs that have at least one AI analysis.

targets.rawSql: SELECT count(DISTINCT fa.test_id) AS "Unique Tests" FROM failure_analyses fa JOIN projects p ON p.id = fa.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE $__timeFilter(fa.analysed_at) AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project')

panels.title: Application Bugs
panels.description: Failures classified APPLICATION_BUG — real defects in the product under test.

targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*) AS "App Bugs" FROM failure_analyses fa JOIN projects p ON p.id = fa.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE fa.category = 'APPLICATION_BUG' AND $__timeFilter(fa.analysed_at) AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project')

panels.title: Flaky Candidates
panels.description: Tests the AI flagged as flaky based on failure patterns.

targets.rawSql: SELECT count(DISTINCT fa.test_id) AS "Flaky Candidates" FROM failure_analyses fa JOIN projects p ON p.id = fa.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE fa.is_flaky_candidate = true AND $__timeFilter(fa.analysed_at) AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project')

panels.title: Avg AI Confidence
panels.description: Mean confidence score across all analyses — higher means clearer root causes.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND((AVG(fa.confidence) * 100)::numeric, 1) AS "Avg Confidence" FROM failure_analyses fa JOIN projects p ON p.id = fa.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE $__timeFilter(fa.analysed_at) AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project')

panels.title: Root-Cause Category Breakdown
panels.description: How Claude classified each failure. APPLICATION_BUG = real product defect; TEST_DEFECT = broken test code; INFRASTRUCTURE = env/CI issue; FLAKY_TEST = non-deterministic failure.

targets.rawSql: SELECT fa.category, count(*) AS count FROM failure_analyses fa JOIN projects p ON p.id = fa.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE $__timeFilter(fa.analysed_at) AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project') GROUP BY fa.category ORDER BY count DESC

panels.title: Category Trend Over Time
panels.description: Failure category counts per time bucket — spot when application bugs spike vs. test maintenance debt.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroup(fa.analysed_at, $__interval) AS time, count(*) AS "APPLICATION_BUG" FROM failure_analyses fa JOIN projects p ON p.id = fa.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE fa.category = 'APPLICATION_BUG' AND $__timeFilter(fa.analysed_at) AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT $__timeGroup(fa.analysed_at, $__interval) AS time, count(*) AS "TEST_DEFECT" FROM failure_analyses fa JOIN projects p ON p.id = fa.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE fa.category = 'TEST_DEFECT' AND $__timeFilter(fa.analysed_at) AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT $__timeGroup(fa.analysed_at, $__interval) AS time, count(*) AS "INFRASTRUCTURE" FROM failure_analyses fa JOIN projects p ON p.id = fa.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE fa.category = 'INFRASTRUCTURE' AND $__timeFilter(fa.analysed_at) AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT $__timeGroup(fa.analysed_at, $__interval) AS time, count(*) AS "FLAKY_TEST" FROM failure_analyses fa JOIN projects p ON p.id = fa.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE fa.category = 'FLAKY_TEST' AND $__timeFilter(fa.analysed_at) AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT $__timeGroup(fa.analysed_at, $__interval) AS time, count(*) AS "UNKNOWN" FROM failure_analyses fa JOIN projects p ON p.id = fa.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE fa.category = 'UNKNOWN' AND $__timeFilter(fa.analysed_at) AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Failure Categories per Project
panels.description: Cross-tab of AI categories per project. Sort by 'App Bug' to find teams with real product defects.

targets.rawSql: SELECT p.name AS "Project", t.name AS "Team", count(*) FILTER (WHERE fa.category = 'APPLICATION_BUG') AS "App Bug", count(*) FILTER (WHERE fa.category = 'TEST_DEFECT') AS "Test Defect", count(*) FILTER (WHERE fa.category = 'INFRASTRUCTURE') AS "Infra", count(*) FILTER (WHERE fa.category = 'FLAKY_TEST') AS "Flaky", count(*) FILTER (WHERE fa.category NOT IN ('APPLICATION_BUG','TEST_DEFECT','INFRASTRUCTURE','FLAKY_TEST')) AS "Unknown", count(*) AS "Total", ROUND((AVG(fa.confidence) * 100)::numeric, 1) AS "Avg Conf %" FROM failure_analyses fa JOIN projects p ON p.id = fa.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE $__timeFilter(fa.analysed_at) AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project') GROUP BY p.name, t.name ORDER BY count(*) DESC

panels.title: Most-Failed Tests with Root Cause
panels.description: Tests with the highest failure count, enriched with AI category, confidence, and root cause. Filter by $category variable above.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(tcr.display_name), fa.test_id) AS "Test", p.name AS "Project", fa.category AS "Category", ROUND((AVG(fa.confidence) * 100)::numeric, 0) AS "Conf %", MAX(fa.root_cause) AS "Root Cause", MAX(fa.affected_component) AS "Component", bool_or(fa.is_flaky_candidate) AS "Flaky?", count(*) AS "Failures", MAX(fa.analysed_at) AS "Last Analysed" FROM failure_analyses fa JOIN projects p ON p.id = fa.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id LEFT JOIN test_case_results tcr ON tcr.id = fa.test_case_result_id WHERE $__timeFilter(fa.analysed_at) AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project') AND ('$category' = 'All' OR fa.category = '$category') GROUP BY fa.test_id, p.name, fa.category ORDER BY count(*) DESC, AVG(fa.confidence) DESC LIMIT 25

panels.title: Actionable Bugs — APPLICATION_BUG ≥ 70% Confidence
panels.description: Failures the AI is highly confident are real product defects. These should be filed as bug tickets. 'Suggested Fix' is Claude's recommended remediation.

targets.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT ON (fa.test_id, fa.project_id) COALESCE(tcr.display_name, fa.test_id) AS "Test", p.name AS "Project", ROUND((fa.confidence * 100)::numeric, 0) AS "Conf %", fa.root_cause AS "Root Cause", LEFT(fa.suggested_fix, 300) AS "Suggested Fix", fa.affected_component AS "Component", itl.issue_key AS "Issue Key", itl.issue_status AS "Issue Status", fa.analysed_at AS "Analysed At" FROM failure_analyses fa JOIN projects p ON p.id = fa.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id LEFT JOIN test_case_results tcr ON tcr.id = fa.test_case_result_id LEFT JOIN issue_tracker_links itl ON itl.test_id = fa.test_id AND itl.project_id = fa.project_id WHERE fa.category = 'APPLICATION_BUG' AND fa.confidence >= 0.70 AND $__timeFilter(fa.analysed_at) AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project') ORDER BY fa.test_id, fa.project_id, fa.confidence DESC LIMIT 25

panels.title: Failures by Component
panels.description: Which application components appear most in failure analyses. Helps prioritise where to invest reliability work.

targets.rawSql: SELECT fa.affected_component AS "metric", count(*) AS "Failures" FROM failure_analyses fa JOIN projects p ON p.id = fa.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE fa.affected_component IS NOT NULL AND fa.affected_component != '' AND $__timeFilter(fa.analysed_at) AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project') GROUP BY fa.affected_component ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Flaky Candidates Detail
panels.description: Tests the AI flagged as potential flakes, correlated against the flakiness scorer classification.

targets.rawSql: SELECT fa.test_id AS "Test", p.name AS "Project", fa.category AS "Category", ROUND((AVG(fa.confidence) * 100)::numeric, 0) AS "Conf %", MAX(fa.root_cause) AS "Root Cause", COALESCE(MAX(fs.classification), 'NOT SCORED') AS "Flakiness Class", ROUND((COALESCE(MAX(fs.score), 0) * 100)::numeric, 1) AS "Flakiness Score", count(*) AS "AI Flags", MAX(fa.analysed_at) AS "Last Seen" FROM failure_analyses fa JOIN projects p ON p.id = fa.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id LEFT JOIN flakiness_scores fs ON fs.test_id = fa.test_id AND fs.project_id = fa.project_id WHERE fa.is_flaky_candidate = true AND $__timeFilter(fa.analysed_at) AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project') GROUP BY fa.test_id, p.name, fa.category ORDER BY COALESCE(MAX(fs.score), 0) DESC, AVG(fa.confidence) DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Unanalysed Failures
panels.description: FAILED test results that have no matching entry in failure_analyses. These are gaps in AI coverage — run the nightly batch or trigger on-demand analysis.

targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*) AS "Unanalysed" FROM test_case_results tcr JOIN test_executions te ON te.id = tcr.execution_id JOIN projects p ON p.id = te.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id LEFT JOIN failure_analyses fa ON fa.test_case_result_id = tcr.id WHERE tcr.status = 'FAILED' AND fa.id IS NULL AND $__timeFilter(tcr.created_at) AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project')

panels.title: Unanalysed Failing Tests
panels.description: Failed tests with no AI analysis yet — includes the raw error message so you can triage without waiting for AI.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(tcr.display_name, tcr.method_name, tcr.test_id) AS "Test Name", p.name AS "Project", count(*) AS "Failures", MAX(tcr.created_at) AS "Last Failure", LEFT(MAX(tcr.failure_message), 300) AS "Raw Error" FROM test_case_results tcr JOIN test_executions te ON te.id = tcr.execution_id JOIN projects p ON p.id = te.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id LEFT JOIN failure_analyses fa ON fa.test_case_result_id = tcr.id WHERE tcr.status = 'FAILED' AND fa.id IS NULL AND $__timeFilter(tcr.created_at) AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project') GROUP BY COALESCE(tcr.display_name, tcr.method_name, tcr.test_id), p.name ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Latest Analyses — Full Detail
panels.description: Most recent AI analyses. Includes the original raw error message from the test runner alongside the AI root cause and suggested fix.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(tcr.display_name, fa.test_id) AS "Test", p.name AS "Project", fa.category AS "Category", ROUND((fa.confidence * 100)::numeric, 0) AS "Conf %", LEFT(tcr.failure_message, 280) AS "Raw Error", fa.root_cause AS "Root Cause", LEFT(fa.suggested_fix, 280) AS "Suggested Fix", fa.affected_component AS "Component", fa.is_flaky_candidate AS "Flaky?", fa.model_version AS "Model", (fa.input_tokens + fa.output_tokens) AS "Tokens", fa.analysed_at AS "Analysed At" FROM failure_analyses fa JOIN projects p ON p.id = fa.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id LEFT JOIN test_case_results tcr ON tcr.id = fa.test_case_result_id WHERE $__timeFilter(fa.analysed_at) AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project') AND ('$category' = 'All' OR fa.category = '$category') ORDER BY fa.analysed_at DESC LIMIT 30

panels.title: Total Tokens (period)
panels.description: Sum of all input + output tokens consumed by the AI provider in the selected time range.

targets.rawSql: SELECT SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens) AS "Total Tokens" FROM failure_analyses fa JOIN projects p ON p.id = fa.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE $__timeFilter(fa.analysed_at) AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project')

panels.title: Input Tokens
panels.description: Total prompt/input tokens sent to the AI provider.

targets.rawSql: SELECT SUM(input_tokens) AS "Input Tokens" FROM failure_analyses fa JOIN projects p ON p.id = fa.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE $__timeFilter(fa.analysed_at) AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project')

panels.title: Output Tokens
panels.description: Total completion/output tokens generated by the AI provider.

targets.rawSql: SELECT SUM(output_tokens) AS "Output Tokens" FROM failure_analyses fa JOIN projects p ON p.id = fa.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE $__timeFilter(fa.analysed_at) AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project')

panels.title: Avg Tokens / Analysis
panels.description: Average total tokens per classification request — lower is better (prompt efficiency).

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(input_tokens + output_tokens), 0) AS "Avg Tokens" FROM failure_analyses fa JOIN projects p ON p.id = fa.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE $__timeFilter(fa.analysed_at) AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project')

panels.title: Est. Cost (USD)
panels.description: Estimated cost based on model pricing. OpenAI gpt-4o: $2.50/1M input, $10/1M output. Claude opus-4-6: $3/1M input, $15/1M output.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN fa.model_version LIKE 'openai/%' THEN (fa.input_tokens / 1000000.0 * 2.50) + (fa.output_tokens / 1000000.0 * 10.0) ELSE (fa.input_tokens / 1000000.0 * 3.0) + (fa.output_tokens / 1000000.0 * 15.0) END)::numeric, 4) AS "Est. Cost" FROM failure_analyses fa JOIN projects p ON p.id = fa.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE $__timeFilter(fa.analysed_at) AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project')

panels.title: Token Usage Over Time
panels.description: Daily input and output token consumption. Use this to spot prompt regressions or spikes in analysis volume.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroup(fa.analysed_at, $__interval, 0) AS time, SUM(fa.input_tokens) AS "Input Tokens" FROM failure_analyses fa JOIN projects p ON p.id = fa.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE $__timeFilter(fa.analysed_at) AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT $__timeGroup(fa.analysed_at, $__interval, 0) AS time, SUM(fa.output_tokens) AS "Output Tokens" FROM failure_analyses fa JOIN projects p ON p.id = fa.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE $__timeFilter(fa.analysed_at) AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Tokens by Model / Provider
panels.description: Total tokens consumed per model version — compare Claude vs OpenAI spend.

targets.rawSql: SELECT fa.model_version AS "Model", SUM(fa.input_tokens + fa.output_tokens) AS "Total Tokens" FROM failure_analyses fa JOIN projects p ON p.id = fa.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE $__timeFilter(fa.analysed_at) AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project') GROUP BY fa.model_version ORDER BY 2 DESC

panels.title: Raw Test Failures
panels.description: Every FAILED test result with its original failure_message and stack_trace from the test runner. Use 'Error Search' variable to filter by keyword. Click any cell to see full content.

targets.rawSql: SELECT tcr.created_at AS "Time", COALESCE(tcr.display_name, tcr.method_name, tcr.test_id) AS "Test", p.name AS "Project", te.environment AS "Env", tcr.status AS "Status", tcr.duration_ms AS "Duration ms", tcr.failure_message AS "Failure Message", LEFT(tcr.stack_trace, 1000) AS "Stack Trace", fa.category AS "AI Category" FROM test_case_results tcr JOIN test_executions te ON te.id = tcr.execution_id JOIN projects p ON p.id = te.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id LEFT JOIN failure_analyses fa ON fa.test_case_result_id = tcr.id WHERE tcr.status IN ('FAILED','BROKEN') AND $__timeFilter(tcr.created_at) AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project') AND ('${search}' = '' OR tcr.failure_message ILIKE '%${search}%' OR tcr.stack_trace ILIKE '%${search}%' OR COALESCE(tcr.display_name, tcr.method_name, tcr.test_id) ILIKE '%${search}%') ORDER BY tcr.created_at DESC LIMIT 100

panels.title: Token Usage by Project
panels.description: Per-project breakdown of AI token consumption and estimated cost.

targets.rawSql: SELECT p.name AS "Project", t.name AS "Team", COUNT(*) AS "Analyses", SUM(fa.input_tokens) AS "Input Tokens", SUM(fa.output_tokens) AS "Output Tokens", SUM(fa.input_tokens + fa.output_tokens) AS "Total Tokens", ROUND(AVG(fa.input_tokens + fa.output_tokens), 0) AS "Avg / Analysis", ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN fa.model_version LIKE 'openai/%' THEN (fa.input_tokens / 1000000.0 * 2.50) + (fa.output_tokens / 1000000.0 * 10.0) ELSE (fa.input_tokens / 1000000.0 * 3.0) + (fa.output_tokens / 1000000.0 * 15.0) END)::numeric, 4) AS "Est. Cost $", MAX(fa.model_version) AS "Model" FROM failure_analyses fa JOIN projects p ON p.id = fa.project_id JOIN teams t ON t.id = p.team_id WHERE $__timeFilter(fa.analysed_at) AND ('$team' = 'All' OR t.slug = '$team') AND ('$project' = 'All' OR p.slug = '$project') GROUP BY p.id, p.name, t.name ORDER BY 6 DESC
